key_event.1928-1937: Mandate administrative buildout; 1932 census and constitutional suspension
key_event.1938-1947: 1943 National Pact and independence crisis mobilization
key_event.1948-1957: Confessional consolidation, merchant republic, and 1952 Rosewater Revolution
key_event.1958-1967: Chehabist state-building amid 1958 crisis and Nasserist mobilization
key_event.1968-1977: Outbreak of civil war and state collapse (1975)
key_event.1978-1987: Civil war deepens; militia para-states replace collapsed central authority
key_event.1988-1997: Taif Agreement, Aoun's defeat, militia disarmament under Syrian tutelage
key_event.1998-2007: Cedar Revolution mobilization after Hariri assassination
key_event.2008-2017: Hezbollah's West Beirut takeover; presidential vacuum and paralysis
key_event.2018-2027: Financial collapse, Beirut blast, state paralysis toward Absent Leviathan
